page.title: Nominal Style and Information Density
page.subtitle_html: Nominal style and information density - C2 formal noun-based phrasing and compact information flow.
page.subtitle_text: C2 formal noun-based phrasing and compact information flow.

blocks.body: {"level":"C2","intro":"Nominal style and information density: compact anchors for turning actions and clauses into precise formal noun phrases.","rules":[{"label":"Nominal focus","text":"Use nouns such as implementation, assessment, expansion, and reduction to make formal claims more compact.","example":"The implementation of this policy will require careful planning."},{"label":"Dense information flow","text":"Pack supporting detail into controlled noun phrases without obscuring the main claim.","example":"The committee's assessment of the evidence was cautious."},{"label":"Formal register","text":"Prefer nominal structures when the style requires distance, precision, or institutional tone.","example":"A gradual reduction in costs is expected."}]}

blocks.heading: C2 focus
blocks.body: This compact page anchors the Polyglot English C2 lesson on nominal style and information density.
